import React, {useEffect, useRef, useState} from 'react'; import {STRINGS} from "../../constants/strings"; function NewChat (props) { const {userData, newChat, newContactMenu, contactList} = props; console.log(contactList) return(
{userData && (

{STRINGS[userData.language].NewChat}

{STRINGS[userData.language].PendingContacts}

{contactList && contactList.map((invite, index) =>
{invite.username}
)} {/* {contactList && (
{contactList.username}
)}*/}

{STRINGS[userData.language].AllContacts}

)}
); } export default NewChat;
